page_content:
Prerequisite: Permission of JOUR-Philip Merrill College of Journalism.

JOUR603 News Videography (3 Credits)

Introduction to shooting, editing and production of video stories for broadcast and the Web; includes newsgathering in the field. Prerequisite: JOUR501 or JOUR502; or permission of JOUR-Philip Merrill College of Journalism.

Jointly offered with: JOUR347.

Restriction: Permission of JOUR-Philip Merrill College of Journalism. Credit Only Granted for: JOUR503 or JOUR603.
